target_pathway.name: benzylisoquinoline-alkaloid-cluster-discovery
target_pathway.scope: Evidence-scored candidate gene discovery for benzylisoquinoline alkaloid (BIA) biosynthesis in Coptis chinensis using public reference data and comparator species.
target_pathway.caveat: Synthetic public-safe example. Treat all bundled fixtures as illustrative; cluster claims still require genome coordinates and neighborhood evidence, and product claims still require functional or LC-MS/MS validation.

candidate_search.description: Remote or configured-workdir candidate search and small dossier.

genome_context.description: Anchor candidate genes to reviewed genome/GFF resources, capture neighboring genes, and gate physical cluster claims on coordinates.

coexpression.description: Quantify expression where sample design permits it and score candidates by coexpression with pathway anchors.

synteny.description: Compare candidate loci against related genomes/transcriptomes to identify orthology, paralogy, and conserved neighborhoods.

full_public_mining.description: Provider-neutral full public-data mining: remote data fetch/import, optional assembly, annotation, candidate search, genome context, BGC/context, synteny, coexpression, dossier, and next-experiment brief.

next_experiment_design.description: Small planning scope that converts evidence gaps into sequencing, metabolomics, and functional-assay follow-ups.

full_campaign.description: Campaign-specific alias for full_public_mining using the example ledgers.

full_campaign_24h.description: One-day complete campaign profile: reference-first, cache-first, no de novo assembly by default, and complete summary dossier with deferred lane manifest.

review_policy.cluster_claim_rule: Physical gene-cluster claims require genome coordinates; transcript-only hits are candidate genes only.
